title: Book of Vile Darkness
author: Robert J. Schwalb
description: In addition to showcasing characters and locations featured in the upcoming Dungeons & Dragons The Book of Vile Darkness Syfy Original Movie, this roleplaying game product is intended for Dungeon Masters looking to broaden their campaigns to include dark subject matter and truly evil threats. It features a detailed look at the nature of evil and the complex challenge of confronting the many dilemmas found within the deepest shadows. It includes: A 32-page facsimile of the Book of Vile Darkness,
